3220050.name: Big Beautiful Women: Giantess Dating Action
3220050.description:
Experience the game made by and for large women enjoyers.

Five years ago, a meteorite crash landed in the Pacific Ocean, causing some women to grow to incredible sizes.

An artificial continent- Jotun-shi- was created to house the new giantesses.

Shortly after moving there, our protagonist reconnects with a long lost childhood friend who has since grown 12 meters tall... and she's only growing taller.

Key Features Include:

  • Over 80 CGs

  • A giant cheerleader

  • Multiple Endings

  • A giant tomboy

  • Lovingly crafted pixel art reminiscent of classic PC98 games

  • A giant milf

  • OST composed by TNH Nebula

If you enjoy larger-than-life ladies, this is the game for you.
